forest-e2.title: Mossy Trail Bend
text: A narrow trail curves here, softened by deep green moss.
The air smells damp and old.

tree.roomDesc: An ancient tree looms over the path, its bark folded like leather.
tree.lookText: The bark is carved with symbols too worn to read. Something has been here a long time.

symbols.roomDesc: Strange symbols are carved into the tree's bark, half-swallowed by moss.
symbols.lookText: Not a language you recognise. But they feel intentional.

moss.roomDesc: Thick moss covers everything, soft enough to sleep on.
moss.lookText: There is a faint impression in it. Something already did sleep here.

twig.roomText: A dry twig lies half-buried in the moss.

msgByRace.goblin: You swing the hatchet. The tree shudders. A branch falls at your feet.
msgByRace.human: You chop cleanly into the bark. A branch drops to the ground.
msgByRace.elf: You hesitate, then strike. The tree loses a branch. You feel it.
